memory:memory/2026-05-08.md:1:11.snippet: # Durable Memories - 2026-05-08 ## Docker Sandbox Connectivity Investigation - Identified that OpenClaw (in container) needs to reach worker agents in Docker Sandboxes. - Determined that `host.docker.internal` resolves correctly to `172.17.0.1`. - Attempted port mapping (`sbx ports`) for `claude-darb`, `codex-darb`, and `opencode-nrp-darb` on host ports 8081, 8082, and 8083 mapping to internal 8080. - Initial connectivity tests failed. - Diagnosed that sandboxes were initially "empty" (no agent processes running), but later verified via GUI dashboard that `claude-darb` is active and communicating with Anthropic APIs. - Current Hypothesis: Agent services inside sandboxes are binding to `127.
